calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Kadevari of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld telephone number 510-337-1001 for Petitioner Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Petitioner Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties Conference Board's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
